meta.subject: TFWWorkbench (smotti/TFWWorkbench) x RE-UE4SS on The Forever Winter (UE 5.4.2)
meta.notes: Compatibility matrix for the 'latest UE4SS breaks TFWWorkbench' problem. status: works|broken|partial|unknown. confidence: verified (first-hand)|reported (community)|inferred|untested. UE4SS CI builds carry no version metadata, so ue4ss_dll_sha256 is the stable identifier. Populated in part by the tfworkbench-compat-research workflow; unverified rows are marked confidence=untested/inferred until confirmed.

entries.notes: Ground-truth local build (see local-evidence/2026-07-13-local-install.md). Confirmed patternsleuth/experimental branch, not stable 3.0.1. TFWWorkbench not yet loaded against it; awaiting in-game test and community corroboration. This is a candidate for the 'latest that breaks it' end of the range.
